channel.title: Redirection on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Redirection on Systology

item.title: Distributed Web Crawler
item.description: A highly resilient architectural design for a Google-scale web crawler; heavily focusing on breadth-first search (BFS), extensive DNS resolution caching, and polite handling of malicious domains.

item.title: URL Shortener & Pastebin
item.description: A robust structural design for a highly available, extremely read-heavy service bridging short aliases to long URLs; implementing Base62 encoding, Snowflake IDs, and strict collision avoidance.
